jobs.title: Business Intelligence Group Manager, Ops & CX
jobs.content: <p><strong>Business Intelligence Group Manager</strong></p><p>Alma is the dominant US-domestic mental-health provider-network and tele-therapy infrastructure platform.</p>

jobs.title: Senior Data Scientist
jobs.content: <p>Lead Alma's Data Science function across the mental-health platform stack & behavioral-health-tech ecosystem.</p>
